prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Vineyard Lies Beneath Us
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Court-Ordered Lifetime
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Trust isn't given. It's rented.
Omen: bees in winter
Relationship dynamic: emotionally charged casserole exchange
Props: casserole dish, ceramic owl, unopened letter

Cast:
- Sienna Hale | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.42 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=once left town without explaining why; buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Tess Dane | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=sommelier with unusual patience | threat_aura=0.7 | space=church basement described as just storage | secrets=keeps duplicate keys for reasons framed as kindness; rehearsed his alibi before anyone asked
- Derek Sutton | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=bartender who knows everybody's business | threat_aura=0.66 | space=old family office described as seasonal materials | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for; may die first or survive unbelievably
- Jenna Dane | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=therapist | threat_aura=0.6 | space=church basement described as just storage | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
- Mara Mercer | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=private school administrator | threat_aura=0.62 | space=marina tackle room described as donation overflow | secrets=has a second phone labeled as a work precaution; rehearsed his alibi before anyone asked
- Luke Bell | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.29 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it; accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Cole Hale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Derek Bell | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Tess Dane is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Sienna Hale says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Bellweather.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Tess?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Cole. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Sienna. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Jenna."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
